query: Audit our Terraform and data-handling SOP against Singapore Government DP-1 through DP-8: residency, encryption, GCC tenancy, sanitisation, witnessed destruction, DLP, and classification disclosure.
Design data protection for an agency case-management system that stores CONFIDENTIAL data in AWS and has an on-prem scanning appliance. Use the SSP parameters rather than inventing requirements.
Our S3 replication and backup-copy jobs send case records from Singapore to us-east-1. Identify the ICT&SS residency finding and implement enforceable region guardrails.
Review whether encryption is actually enabled for RDS, EBS, S3, queues, caches, snapshots, and internal service-to-service traffic in this GCC workload.
Draft a storage disposal procedure for government data on failed disks and retired NAS appliances, including recognised sanitisation, destruction, agency witnesses, and evidence records.
Set up DLP for a ministry collaboration and cloud-storage environment so sensitive transfers are detected and blocked rather than merely inventoried.
Our officer form accepts pasted case notes but gives no security-classification ceiling. Implement the DP-8 disclosure in the UI and user guidance.
Assess a proposed SaaS service that may process agency data outside the central cloud tenant. Map residency, encryption, tenancy, and DLP gaps to the government Data Protection controls.

We are migrating an agency workload from Azure to GCC AWS. Produce a data-movement plan that preserves Singapore residency, encryption on every hop, backups, tenant guardrails, and sanitisation of the old storage.
Explain how the PDPA exclusion for public agencies relates to PSGA and ICT&SS obligations, then audit this system's concrete DP controls without treating the exclusion as a relaxation.
Choose approved cryptographic algorithms, design envelope encryption, set key rotation periods, and configure HSM-backed key storage under CK-1 through CK-4.
Fix unsalted password hashing, hardcoded secrets, unsafe SQL, CSP, HSTS, and file uploads in this application.
Set up CloudTrail, database audit logs, off-box storage, GCSOC forwarding, retention, and log sanitisation.
We need a privacy notice and consent language for a private-sector Singapore ecommerce site under the PDPA. No government system is involved.
Configure immutable backups, recovery testing, RTO/RPO, and annual business continuity exercises for a government service.
Review IAM roles, MFA, inactive users, account reviews, SCIM provisioning, and government SSO.
Build a Myinfo v5 pre-fill integration with FAPI 2.0, DPoP, consent scopes, and the Singpass Developer Portal.
Create a security-testing programme with host vulnerability scans, CSPM, security.txt, independent VAPT, and remediation SLAs.
Determine which SSP applies based on system risk, data classification, cloud versus on-prem hosting, and CII status.
Route public and confidential prompts between overseas and Singapore-hosted GenAI APIs, add no-log/no-train terms, and evaluate model outputs.
